title: Local authority to furnish copy of code
doc_html:
§1370.  Local authority to furnish copy of code

The governing body of the municipality or parish shall keep an ample supply of copies in pamphlet form of the code, which shall be made available to any interested party at reasonable cost.

Amended by Acts 1975, No. 635, §1.

§1370.  Local authority to furnish copy of code
The governing body of the municipality or parish shall keep an ample supply of copies in pamphlet form of the code, which shall be made available to any interested party at reasonable cost.
Amended by Acts 1975, No. 635, §1.
